book.title: Padova Fantastica
book.author: Grazia Guarnieri
book.introduction_note: Giandomenico Tono, libraio — Libreria Pangea, Padova

editorial_principle: Each field does not describe Padova but reconfigures its legibility as a system of productive paradoxes in which excellence and resistance, origin and conflict, visibility and invisibility co-occupy the same coordinates without resolution.

fields.label: paradosso_fondativo
fields.basho: Padova simultaneously claims the oldest university in Europe and the longest resistance to academic innovation; both remain structurally inseparable
fields.kokyu: advancement and resistance operate at identical temporal velocity
fields.activation_condition: cultural primacy recognition — any encounter with Padovan institutional identity
fields.persistence_rule: field persists as long as Padova claims both primacy and conservatism simultaneously
fields.dissolution_rule: structurally non-dissolvable: the paradox is the city's identity
fields.textual_anchor_it: Nel 1222 Padova fonda l'Università, la più antica e prestigiosa d'Europa.

fields.label: acqua_come_conflitto
fields.basho: water is a political residue rather than a natural element; canals encode unresolved medieval conflict
fields.kokyu: hydraulic rhythm follows diplomatic latency — the flow moves at the pace of a peace never fully signed
fields.activation_condition: any perception of the Padovan canal system
fields.persistence_rule: field persists as long as the infrastructure built from spite remains the city's water supply
fields.dissolution_rule: field cannot dissolve as long as the canals maintain their Vicentine origin
fields.textual_anchor_it: con Vicenza e i vicentini scavano per dispetto il Canale Bisatto dove fanno confluire il Bacchiglione.

fields.label: colpa_bellezza
fields.basho: beauty and guilt occupy the same moral coordinate in the Scrovegni system; neither can be accessed without activating the other
fields.kokyu: temporal simultaneity of sin and redemption — the chapel compresses centuries of usury into a single architectural gesture
fields.activation_condition: chapel access with awareness of its moral origin
fields.persistence_rule: field persists as long as both Giotto's blue and the Scrovegni usury are simultaneously known
fields.dissolution_rule: field collapses only if one element is forgotten — practically impossible given Dante's Inferno
fields.textual_anchor_it: Rinaldo Scrovegni è un rapace banchiere conosciuto e temuto non solo nella sua nativa Padova, ma in tutta la penisola italiana.

fields.label: invisibile_femminile_padovano
fields.basho: female literary primacy exists structurally but is erased from canonical visibility; the absence is more operative than presence would be
fields.kokyu: emergence → decisive action → archival erasure — a cycle that repeats across centuries without resolution
fields.activation_condition: any literary primacy discourse that omits Bigolina
fields.persistence_rule: field persists precisely through historiographic omission: the less named, the more structurally active
fields.dissolution_rule: structurally non-dissolvable due to archival incompleteness
fields.textual_anchor_it: Un esempio è la storia di Giulia Bigolina, che vi verrà svelata nelle pagine seguenti.

rules: any field can modify activation thresholds of any other field
interference does not cancel but reweights perceptual intensity
no field retains stable intensity under cross-exposure

system_note.system_behavior: fields remain stable locally but unstable relationally; interference is non-hierarchical and non-cancelling
system_note.key_change: introduction of field_interference_layer as non-hierarchical cross-modulation — first in Guide Fantastiche series
